title: Design Group Kids Create Christmas Scratch Art Set Childrens Activity Pack Festive Stocking Filler Age 3+
features: FUN & FESTIVE ACTIVITIES: This set includes scratch art activities that are perfect for keeping kids entertained and creatively engaged during the holidays.
CONTAINS ALL YOU NEED: 2 x Scratch Art Sheets & a wooden tool, everything needed for scratch art fun is included, allowing children to create beautiful designs with ease.
GREAT GIFT IDEA: Ideal for party bag fillers, stocking stuffers, or a special gift, this set is sure to bring joy and festive spirit to any occasion.
DEVELOP CORE SKILLS: This crafting kit helps young children develop fine-motor, visual, and tactile-sensory skills - all while having fun, creating a fun tree decoration, and expressing themselves!
SUITABLE FOR AGES 3+: Designed with young children in mind, this set offers a safe and enjoyable way to explore creativity.
description: Kids Create Christmas Activity sets. Fun festive activities including Scratch and Velvet Art. Each pack contains all you need for a fun festive time. Great gift, ideal for a Party Bag Filler or just for a snow days. Suitable for ages 3+
